news.title: This Oil Market Indicator Shows Easing Supply Fears
news.summary: In the oil market, traders track the difference between the price of futures contracts with different expiry dates as much as they do the price of crude you read about in headlines.  After the U.S. and Iran reached a deal that could see plenty of crude and refined fuels flow out of the Persian Gulf, this indicator shows ebbing concerns about a massive supply squeeze.

Almost $56 million in longs were liquidated from top crypto assets such as BTC, ETH, XRP, WLD, and SPCX in just the last few hours.
